query:
INSERT INTO site_settings (setting_key, setting_value, setting_type, description, updated_at) VALUES 
('events_notice_enabled', 'true', 'boolean', 'Enable notice banner on events & catering page', NOW()),
('events_notice_text', 'We''re currently booking events 3 months in advance. Contact us early to secure your date!', 'text', 'Notice message displayed on events & catering page', NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE updated_at = NOW();
